creator: gnat@frii.com
text:
src/install.sh lists 'smailcf' as one of the source packages to install,
but there is no smailcf in the 3.0-RELEASE/src distribution.

Fix: 

Either add the smailcf packages or take it out of install.sh

I don't know if this will cause a src installation to fail, because I
haven't yet tried to do one with 3.0-RELEASE.
How-To-Repeat: 
Look for yourself :-)
